activities.title: FNA Role Play — Agent & Client
instructions: Pair with a squad mate and swap roles as advisor and client
8 min discovery / 4 min feedback / swap roles
Use Week 1 persona or Week 2 validated segment — no product pitch
Capture what worked, what felt awkward, and what builds trust
debriefQuestions: What worked in your FNA conversation?

activities.title: Improve FEC Box 4 — Client Experience
instructions: Open your Week 3 Day 3 Portfolio in the Playbook
Answer reflection prompts from the morning role play
Edit FEC Box 4 — describe what your client experience should look like

activities.title: Improve FEC Box 5 — Winning Strategy
instructions: Answer: Why will clients choose your advisory practice instead of another?
Base your answer on experience, understanding, and trust from role play
Edit FEC Box 5 in the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas
